validation.antiPhishingRequired: Enter an anti-phishing code before saving.
validation.antiPhishingTooLong: Anti-phishing code must be 50 characters or fewer.

overview.title: Security Control
overview.description: Operate active sessions, 2FA, anti-phishing controls, and baseline account hardening from one operator surface.
overview.routesDescription: Jump directly into the exact trust control you need without leaving the admin shell.

routes.reviewQueue: Work risk review queues, evidence attachments, and governance actions from one internal workflow rail.
routes.sessions: Review all active sessions and revoke stale or suspicious devices.
routes.twoFactor: Provision TOTP, validate setup, or disable 2FA with re-auth.
routes.antiPhishing: Manage the verification code shown in outbound emails.
routes.posture: Review trust signals and rotate the account password.

overview.signalsDescription: Real-time signals pulled from account session state and security primitives.

signals.antiPhishingHint: Email verification phrase for operator-facing mail.
signals.accountHint: Active accounts can authenticate and operate normally.

overview.sessionsDescription: Quick view of current device footprint before opening the sessions console.
overview.identityDescription: Core account facts for this admin operator.

guidance.strong: Trust posture is strong. Focus on keeping sessions tight and rotating secrets only when operationally necessary.
guidance.moderate: Trust posture is acceptable, but at least one hardening layer is still missing or too broad.
guidance.weak: Trust posture is weak. Enable 2FA, set anti-phishing, and reduce excess sessions first.

reviewQueue.title: Review Queue
reviewQueue.description: Process canonical risk reviews, attach evidence, record governance actions, and resolve decisions from one internal queue.

queue.title: Queue Inventory
queue.description: Every row is a canonical risk review record surfaced from the backend queue.
queue.loadError: Could not load the risk review queue.
queue.empty: No review items are currently waiting in the queue.
queue.subject: Principal subject

detail.title: Review Detail
detail.description: Inspect the selected review, subject posture, attached evidence, and linked governance actions.
detail.loadError: Could not load the selected review.
detail.empty: Select a review from the queue to inspect it.
detail.subject: Subject
detail.noAttachments: No attachments linked to this review yet.
detail.noGovernanceActions: No governance actions linked to this review yet.

attachments.title: Attach Evidence
attachments.description: Link a storage-backed artifact to the currently selected review without leaving the queue workflow.

governance.title: Governance Action
governance.description: Record the operational action that accompanies the selected review and keep the audit trail canonical.

fields.reasonPlaceholder: Describe why this governance action is required.

resolve.title: Resolve Review
resolve.description: Finalize the selected review with a recorded decision and resolution evidence.

feedback.selectReview: Select a review from the queue first.
feedback.invalidAttachmentMetadata: Attachment metadata must be a valid JSON object.
feedback.invalidGovernancePayload: Governance payload must be a valid JSON object.
feedback.invalidResolutionEvidence: Resolution evidence must be a valid JSON object.

sessions.title: Sessions Console
sessions.description: Inspect every active admin session, revoke stale devices, and execute a full hard stop when needed.
sessions.currentDescription: This is the device currently operating the admin console.
sessions.hardStopDescription: Immediately revoke every session, including the one running this admin console.
sessions.logoutAllConfirm: Revoke all sessions and sign out this admin console?
sessions.revokeConfirm: Revoke this device session from the admin account?

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Control
twoFactor.description: Provision, validate, and disable TOTP-based 2FA for the current admin account.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Re-authenticate with your password before generating a fresh TOTP secret.
twoFactor.provisioningDescription: Scan the QR code in your authenticator app, then verify with a live TOTP code.
twoFactor.validateDescription: Check that the authenticator currently generates a valid code.
twoFactor.disableDescription: Disabling 2FA requires both the account password and a live TOTP code.
twoFactor.recoveryDescription: Store these codes securely. They are shown here once after disable completes.
twoFactor.notesDescription: Keep 2FA enabled for every privileged account. Disable only for controlled recovery procedures.

antiPhishing.title: Anti-phishing Control
antiPhishing.description: Manage the custom code shown in outbound emails so staff can verify legitimate platform mail.
antiPhishing.currentDescription: This code is displayed in platform emails to help identify authentic messages.
antiPhishing.explainer: Use a short internal phrase that staff can recognize instantly and attackers cannot guess.
antiPhishing.editorDescription: Set or rotate the code used in outbound email templates.
antiPhishing.deleteDescription: Delete the current anti-phishing phrase if you need to reset it completely.

posture.title: Security Posture
posture.description: Review trust signals for this admin identity and rotate the password when posture needs improvement.
posture.signalsDescription: Hardening coverage built from the currently authenticated admin session.

signals.twoFactorHint: TOTP sign-in requirement for privileged access.
signals.antiPhishingHint: Verification phrase for outbound mail trust.
signals.emailHint: Verified email improves recovery and trust.
signals.sessionsHint: Lower device sprawl reduces takeover surface.

posture.passwordDescription: Use this form to rotate the current admin password after validation.

guidance.secondary: Keep privileged accounts on unique passwords, active 2FA, and the smallest session footprint practical for operations.
guidance.strong: This account is well hardened. Keep session count low and rotate credentials on planned intervals or incident triggers.
guidance.moderate: This account is serviceable but still missing at least one trust layer or has too many active sessions.
guidance.weak: This account needs immediate hardening. Enable 2FA, add anti-phishing, and rotate the password after cleaning sessions.
